# nxos_network_qos (Data Source)

This data source can read the network QoS configuration on NX-OS devices, including class maps and policy maps with MTU and pause settings.

### API Documentation

- [ipqosNwQoS](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:NwQoS/)
- [ipqosCMapEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:CMapEntity/)
- [ipqosCMapInst](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:CMapInst/)
- [ipqosCos](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:Cos/)
- [ipqosPMapEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:PMapEntity/)
- [ipqosPMapInst](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:PMapInst/)
- [ipqosMatchCMap](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:MatchCMap/)
- [ipqosSetMTU](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:SetMTU/)
- [ipqosPause](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:Pause/)
- [ipqosServPol](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:ServPol/)
- [ipqosIngress](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:Ingress/)
- [ipqosSystem](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:System/)
- [ipqosInst](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Qos/ipqos:Inst/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nxos_network_qos" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `class_maps` (Attributes Map) List of class maps.
  - Map key: `name` - Name of class-map. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--class_maps))
- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.
- `policy_map_statistics` (Boolean) Turn on/off statistics.
- `policy_maps` (Attributes Map) List of policy maps.
  - Map key: `name` - Name of policy-map. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy_maps))
- `system_in_policy_map_name` (String) Policy-map Name.

<a id="nestedatt--class_maps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `class_maps`

Read-Only:

- `cos_values` (Attributes Map) List of CoS values to match.
  - Map key: `value` - Cos value.
  - Key range: `0`-`7` (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--class_maps--cos_values))
- `match_type` (String) Match-any, match-all or match-first.

<a id="nestedatt--class_maps--cos_values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `class_maps.cos_values`



<a id="nestedatt--policy_maps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy_maps`

Read-Only:

- `match_class_maps` (Attributes Map) List of match class maps.
  - Map key: `name` - Match using class-map. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy_maps--match_class_maps))
- `match_type` (String) Match-any, match-all or match-first.

<a id="nestedatt--policy_maps--match_class_maps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy_maps.match_class_maps`

Read-Only:

- `mtu_value` (Number) Set MTU value.
- `next_class_map` (String) Insert before the given class-map.
- `pause_buffer_size` (Number) Size in bytes.
- `pause_dynamic` (Number) Pause dynamic alpha.
- `pause_headroom` (Number) Headroom size.
- `pause_no_drop` (Boolean) Configure pause no-drop mode.
- `pause_pfc_cos_0` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 0 value.
- `pause_pfc_cos_1` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 1 value.
- `pause_pfc_cos_2` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 2 value.
- `pause_pfc_cos_3` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 3 value.
- `pause_pfc_cos_4` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 4 value.
- `pause_pfc_cos_5` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 5 value.
- `pause_pfc_cos_6` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 6 value.
- `pause_pfc_cos_7` (Boolean) Configure pfc-cos 7 value.
- `pause_receive` (Boolean) Configure pause receive only mode.
- `pause_resume_offset` (Number) Xon offset.
- `pause_resume_threshold` (Number) Xon bytes.
- `pause_threshold` (Number) Xoff bytes.
- `previous_class_map` (String) Insert after the given class-map.
